qt.title: Daily Devotion
qt.scripture_text:
a new song; sing to the L
, praise his name; proclaim his salvation day after day.
Declare his glory among the nations, his marvelous deeds among all peoples.
and most worthy of praise; he is to be feared above all gods.
For all the gods of the nations are idols, but the L
Splendor and majesty are before him; strength and glory are in his sanctuary.
, all you families of nations, ascribe to the L
the glory due his name; bring an offering and come into his courts.
in the splendor of his holiness; tremble before him, all the earth.
Say among the nations, “The L
reigns.” The world is firmly established, it cannot be moved; he will judge the peoples with equity.
qt.reflection:
Let the heavens rejoice, let the earth be glad; let the sea resound, and all that is in it.
Let the fields be jubilant, and everything in them; let all the trees of the forest sing for joy.
Let all creation rejoice before the L
, for he comes, he comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world in righteousness and the peoples in his faithfulness.
THE HOLY BIBLE, NEW INTERNATIONAL VERSION®, NIV® Copyright © 1973, 1978, 1984, 2011 by Biblica, Inc.® Used by Permission of Biblica, Inc.® All rights reserved worldwide.
Proclaim His Glory (96:1–6)
The psalmist issues a universal call to worship, inviting all people across the earth to declare the greatness of God. God’s people are called to sing a new song and proclaim His salvation to the nations. The “nations,” or Gentiles, represent those outside God’s covenant, those who worship other gods. In contrast with these idols, the Lord alone is glorious, clothed in splendor, strength, and majesty. Worship is both personal and missional: it not only expresses gratitude for who God is but also declares His saving work to those who have yet to know Him. As we gather in authentic corporate worship, our songs, prayers, and lives become a living testimony of God’s power and faithfulness, pointing the world to His glory.
Reflect on this season of your life and consider what you have seen of God’s glory and His works. Who might you be able to share these things with this week?
Anticipatory Praise (96:7–13)
In these verses, God calls all peoples, including Gentiles, to worship Him in the temple courts. The psalmist emphasizes that all creation—heavens, earth, seas, fields, and trees—joins in praise, highlighting the cosmic scope of God’s kingdom. All creation rejoices at the prospect of the Lord’s coming and at the promise of His righteous judgment. Worship is both a personal devotion and a missional witness, inviting others to acknowledge God’s sovereign authority and greatness. Worship is not limited to sacred spaces but extends into daily life and all of creation. It is also anticipatory, looking forward to the full establishment of God’s kingdom, when every creature will joyfully participate in universal praise.
Meditate on the truth that all creation rejoices at God’s coming. Let your heart rest in the anticipation of His righteous judgment.
Lord God, I praise You for Your unmatched glory and saving power. Teach Your people to worship You with hearts fully devoted, and may our songs, words, and lives point others to Your salvation. Use us to declare Your greatness to all nations. In Jesus’ name I pray, amen.

essay.title: Making Plans with Friends
essay.text: Making plans with friends has become increasingly challenging in our busy modern lives. As working professionals, we often find ourselves juggling multiple schedules and trying to find a time that works for everyone. When I want to organize a get-together, I usually start by creating a group chat and suggesting a few different dates and activities. Sometimes we decide to try a new restaurant that's been getting good reviews, or we might opt for a casual coffee meetup on the weekend. One thing I've learned is that flexibility is key. Not everyone can make it to every gathering, and that's perfectly okay. The most important thing is maintaining those connections and making an effort to spend quality time together. Even if it's just a quick lunch during the workweek or a brief evening walk, these moments help strengthen our friendships. I've found that the friends who make an effort to show up, even when life gets hectic, are the ones worth keeping close.
essay.korean_summary: 바쁜 현대 생활에서 친구들과 약속을 잡는 것은 점점 어려워지고 있습니다. 여러 일정을 조율하고 모두에게 맞는 시간을 찾기 위해 그룹 채팅을 만들어 다양한 날짜와 활동을 제안합니다. 유연성이 중요하며, 바쁜 일상 속에서도 노력하는 친구들과의 관계를 소중히 여기는 것이 핵심입니다.

key_expressions.example: We are called to proclaim his salvation to all nations and share the good news.
Through our actions and words, we can declare his glory in our workplace.
Your consistent integrity at work serves as a living testimony of your values.
Authentic worship comes from a sincere heart, not just following rituals.
As a project manager, I'm constantly juggling multiple schedules to meet deadlines.
Let's find a meeting time that works for everyone on the team.
In today's business environment, flexibility is key to adapting to changes.
Colleagues who support you during tough times are worth keeping close.

today_sentences.english: Let's find a time that works for everyone and schedule the quarterly review meeting.
today_sentences.korean: 분기별 검토 회의를 위해 모두에게 맞는 시간을 찾아 일정을 잡아봅시다.

today_sentences.english: We need to be more flexible with our approach to handle unexpected client requests.
today_sentences.korean: 예상치 못한 고객 요청을 처리하기 위해 우리의 접근 방식을 더욱 유연하게 해야 합니다.
today_sentences.grammar_point: need to + 동사원형 - 필요성이나 의무를 나타내는 표현

today_sentences.english: I'm trying to organize a get-together with my college friends this weekend.
today_sentences.korean: 이번 주말에 대학 친구들과 모임을 주선하려고 해요.
today_sentences.grammar_point: try to + 동사원형 - 노력이나 시도를 나타내는 표현

quiz.korean: 바쁜 일정 때문에 여러 약속을 조율하기가 어려워요.
quiz.answer: It's difficult to juggle multiple appointments because of my busy schedule.

quiz.korean: 모두에게 맞는 시간을 찾는 것이 가장 큰 과제입니다.
quiz.answer: Finding a time that works for everyone is the biggest challenge.

quiz.korean: 우리는 하나님의 영광을 세상에 선포해야 합니다.
quiz.answer: We should declare God's glory to the world.

quiz.sentence: As working professionals, we often find ourselves ___ multiple schedules.
quiz.korean: 직장인으로서 우리는 종종 여러 일정을 조율하는 자신을 발견합니다.

quiz.sentence: The most important thing is maintaining those ___ and making an effort.
quiz.korean: 가장 중요한 것은 그런 관계들을 유지하고 노력하는 것입니다.

quiz.sentence: Our lives become a living ___ of God's power and faithfulness.
quiz.korean: 우리의 삶은 하나님의 능력과 신실하심에 대한 살아있는 증거가 됩니다.
